summary: Completed testing of bidirectional rating system (client reviews) - iteration 14. All backend tests passed (15/16, 1 skipped). All frontend features verified working.

minor.issue: Route order bug - /me was matching /{user_id} first. FIXED by reordering routes in social_routes.py

passed_tests: POST /api/reviews/client returns 403 if user is not a provider (admin tested)
POST /api/reviews/client creates a client review with sub-ratings (punctuality, pet_behavior, communication)
POST /api/reviews/client returns 400 if already reviewed same client
GET /api/reviews/client/{user_id} returns reviews for a client with client info
GET /api/reviews/client/me returns reviews about current user as client
GET /api/reviews/provider/given returns reviews given by current provider
All client review endpoints require authentication (401)
Dashboard shows 'Mis Mascotas' section with pets
Dashboard shows 'Mis Calificaciones' section when client has reviews
critical_code_review_comments: Route order bug FIXED: /reviews/client/me must be defined BEFORE /reviews/client/{user_id} in FastAPI to avoid 'me' being matched as user_id
ClientReviewCreate model correctly validates rating fields (1-5 range)
Client average rating (client_rating, total_client_reviews) correctly updated in users collection after review
Provider cannot review same client twice (unique constraint enforced)
data-testid attributes properly added for testing: my-client-reviews, rate-clients-section, provider-dashboard

success_rate.backend: 100% - 15/15 tests passed (1 skipped due to fixture issue)

seed_data_creation: Created test provider (test_provider_ui@test.com) and test client (test_client_ui@test.com). Created client review from provider to client for UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested bidirectional rating system. Key endpoints: POST /api/reviews/client (provider reviews client), GET /api/reviews/client/{user_id}, GET /api/reviews/client/me, GET /api/reviews/provider/given. ClientReviewCreate model includes rating, punctuality, pet_behavior, communication, comment fields. Dashboard shows 'Mis Calificaciones' section when user has client reviews. Provider Dashboard shows 'Calificar Clientes' section listing conversations with rate button. Route order bug was fixed - /me endpoints must come before /{id} endpoints in FastAPI.

features_verified.post_reviews_client: ✓ Provider can review client with sub-ratings (punctuality, pet_behavior, communication)
features_verified.post_reviews_client_403: ✓ Non-provider (admin) gets 403 when trying to review client
features_verified.get_reviews_client_user_id: ✓ Returns reviews for specific client with client info
features_verified.get_reviews_client_me: ✓ Returns reviews about current user (after route order fix)
features_verified.get_reviews_provider_given: ✓ Returns reviews given by current provider
features_verified.dashboard_mis_calificaciones: ✓ Shows 'Mis Calificaciones' section with sub-ratings when client has reviews
features_verified.provider_calificar_clientes: ✓ Shows 'Calificar Clientes' section with conversations list
features_verified.sos_button_regression: ✓ Provider dashboard shows SOS emergency button
features_verified.register_role_selection_regression: ✓ Register page shows role selection (Busco un Cuidador / Quiero ser Cuidador)

route_order_bug.issue: GET /api/reviews/client/me was matching /{user_id} route because it was defined after. 'me' was being treated as user_id parameter.
